title: poa rauhii
intro: Poa rauhii is a species of grass native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, specifically found in Hawaii and the Marshall Islands. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa rauhii include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and aid in wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and is traditionally used by local communities to promote overall well-being and skin health.
